extract: Steelix (Japanese: ハガネール Haganeil) is a dual-type Steel/Ground Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Onix when traded while holding a Metal Coat. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.) Steelix can Mega Evolve into Mega Steelix using the Steelixite. Mega Steelix was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.
